results.title: Kasteni, mbemba win be more race
results.description: Malawi Defence Force (MDF) athletes Kefasi Kasiteni and Fostina Mbemba yesterday won the 2026 Standard Bank Be More Race in 21-kilometre (km) men and ladies categories, respectively, at Bingu National Stadium in Lilongwe. The competition attracted over 4 000 athletes, who contested in in 21km, 10km and 5km distances. In the 21km men’s category, Kasteni ... The post Kasteni, mbemba win be more race appeared first on Nation Online .

results.title: Ailsa Lister reprimanded for ICC Code of Conduct breach at Women’s T20 World Cup
results.description: Ailsa Lister receives an official ICC reprimand for breaching Level 1 of the Code of Conduct during Scotland’s Women’s T20 World Cup clash against the West Indies.

results.title: In-form Warriors prop forced off
results.description: Warriors forward Jackson Ford leaves the field clutching at his shoulder, before Wayde Egan stays down with a leg complaint.

results.title: Court orders trial for Spanish PM’s wife in corruption case
results.description: Investing.com -- A Madrid court has ordered Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez’s wife, Begoña Gomez, to stand trial on charges including influence peddling, corruption in business dealings, and embezzlement of public funds, Bloomberg reported.
